title: On the Landing
content:
آ آ آ آ BOBBY, aetat. 3ï؟½. JOHNNY, aetat. 4ï؟½.


BOBBY
آ آ آ آ DO you know why theyï؟½ve put us in that back room,
آ آ آ آ Up in the attic, close against the sky,
آ آ آ آ And made believe our nurseryï؟½s a cloak-room?
آ آ آ آ Do you know why?

JOHNNY
آ آ آ آ No more I donï؟½t, nor why that Sammyï؟½s mother,
آ آ آ آ What Ma thinks horrid, ï؟½cause he bunged my eye,
آ آ آ آ Eats an ice cream, down there, like any other!
آ آ آ آ No more donï؟½t I!

BOBBY
آ آ آ آ Do you know why Nurse says it isnï؟½t manners
آ آ آ آ For you and me to ask folks twice for pie,
آ آ آ آ And no one hits that man with two bananas?
آ آ آ آ Do you know why?

JOHNNY
آ آ آ آ No more I donï؟½t, nor why that girl, whose dress is
آ آ آ آ Off of her shoulders, donï؟½t catch cold and die,
آ آ آ آ When you and me gets croup when we undresses!
آ آ آ آ No more donï؟½t I!

BOBBY
آ آ آ آ Perhaps she ainï؟½t as good as you and I is,
آ آ آ آ And God donï؟½t want her up there in the sky,
آ آ آ آ And lets her live to come in just when pie is
آ آ آ آ Perhaps thatï؟½s why!

JOHNNY
آ آ آ آ Do you know why that man thatï؟½s got a cropped head
آ آ آ آ Rubbed it just now as if he felt a fly?
آ آ آ آ Could it be, Bobby, something that I dropded?
آ آ آ آ And is that why?

BOBBY
آ آ آ آ Good boys behaves, and so they donï؟½t get scolded,
آ آ آ آ Nor drop hot milk on folks as they pass by.

JOHNNY (piously)
آ آ آ آ Marbles would bounce on Mr. Jonesï؟½ bald head
آ آ آ آ But I shaï؟½nï؟½t try!

BOBBY
آ آ آ آ Do you know why Aunt Jane is always snarling
آ آ آ آ At you and me because we tells a lie,
آ آ آ آ And she donï؟½t slap that man that called her darling?
آ آ آ آ Do you know why?

JOHNNY
آ آ آ آ No more I donï؟½t, nor why that man with Mamma
آ آ آ آ Just kissed her hand.

BOBBY
آ آ آ آ She hurt it and thatï؟½s why;
آ آ آ آ He made it well, the very way that Mamma
آ آ آ آ Does do to I.

JOHNNY
آ آ آ آ I feel so sleepy. . . . Was that Papa kissed us?
آ آ آ آ What made him sigh, and look up to the sky?

BOBBY
آ آ آ آ We werenï؟½t downstairs, and he and God had missed us,
آ آ آ آ And that was why!
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Bret Harte (Francis) delivers a powerful performance in "On the Landing"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
